prestazioni: Supercharged 1.8L Toyota 2ZZ-GE (engine code: 2ZZ-GE) with a Harrop HTV 2300 supercharger upgrade, running 12 psi of boost on a custom Lotus T4e ECU remap by DynoTorque, paired with a Titan Motorsports intercooler and a custom 3-inch stainless steel charge pipe system with V-band clamps for reduced lag and improved airflow efficiency.

Full titanium exhaust system by Hayward & Scott, featuring a 3.5-inch center section with a straight-pipe design, bypass valves, and a 4-into-1 collector, reducing weight by 18 lbs while maintaining backpressure for optimal supercharger performance. Includes a custom X-pipe for balanced exhaust scavenging.

Ohlins TTX40 coilover suspension with 2-way adjustable dampers, custom valving for Lotus Exige chassis dynamics, and spherical bearing top mounts. Paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 1200N/mm rear springs, adjustable front and rear anti-roll bars by SuperPro (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polybushings throughout for razor-sharp turn-in response.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by KW Automotive, featuring extended front fenders with integrated canards, a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust outlets, and a one-piece carbon fiber rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps (30mm max height) for high-speed stability. Includes custom carbon fiber side skirts with air curtains for brake cooling.

Custom front splitter by Vorsteiner, designed specifically for the Exige’s aero profile, with a 3-stage adjustable dive plane system for fine-tuning downforce. Paired with a carbon fiber hood featuring a central NACA duct for direct intercooler airflow, reducing intake temps by 15°C under full load.

BBS LM-RS II 18x9.5 +30 front and 18x11 +45 rear wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 305/30/18 rear) for maximum mechanical grip. Custom titanium wheel studs by ARP and lightweight aluminum lug nuts by Bimecc reduce unsprung weight by 2.5 lbs per corner. Includes a custom titanium valve stem kit by HRE for further weight savings.
